_doc: Per-type counts the deterministic-by-id sampler MUST produce. Locked by spike doc §4.2. Total = 50.
selection_rule: After loading longmemeval_s_cleaned.json, drop any sample whose question_id ends with '_abs'. Group remaining samples by question_type. Within each group, sort question_ids ascending (lexicographic). Take the first N ids per the distribution above. Concatenate the per-type lists in the order the distribution table is written here.
